calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-22-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2015 Set For Trial On Jun-27-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Continued To Dec-02-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2015 Continued To Oct-14-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBIN D. KORTE OF SELVIN WRATH HALMAN LLP, TEL. NO. 1-510-874-1805 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT QBE INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED. An insurer may not be sued for negligent handling of a claim; any recovery must be based on a breach of contract claim instead. (Sanchez v. Lindsey Morden Claims Services, Inc. (1999) 72 Cal.App.4th 249, 254.) The first cause of action, for negligence, is therefore sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff shall have 10 days' leave to amend the second cause of action, for breach of contract, to either attach or incorporate verbatim the terms of the operative insurance policy, and to plead facts showing the breach, whether Plaintiff performed all conditions of the contract, and how Plaintiff was damaged. (See Oasis West v. Goldman (2011) 51 Cal.4th 811, 821.) Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-25-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2015 Continued To Sep-02-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
